summary: Install-time host reconnaissance and exfiltration via postinstall hook
details: The package's postinstall.js executes automatically on `npm install` and gathers host identifiers (os.hostname(), process.cwd()) along with filesystem and DNS data. The collected information is base64-encoded (Buffer.from(...).toString('base64')) and transmitted off-host via require('https') and require('dns') channels. The package name and version (99.0.0) are consistent with a placeholder lure shape, and the postinstall behavior provides no functional purpose to the installer. Running `npm install` on this package leaks host metadata to an attacker-controlled destination before any consumer code is invoked.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
